title: HK police lost control during quarrel and drew gun

replies.msg:
https://www.facebook.com/102458676557543/posts/1623729044430491?sfns=mo

From the clip this happens tonight at 1142am at Whampoa, Kowloon. A bunch of policeman was arguing with citizens gathered on the street. A high-ranked officer violently pushed a guy in red shirt out of his way and drew his handgun out while threatening the angry crowd.
